title: ForgetResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag forget` on stdout as a single JSON line.

forgotten.description: True when the memory was soft-deleted by this invocation.

deleted_at.description: Unix epoch seconds when the memory was soft-deleted. Absent when action=not_found.

deleted_at_iso.description: RFC 3339 timestamp parallel to deleted_at for ISO 8601 parsers. Absent when action=not_found.
